source_pr.title: ddl: show the failed analyze-status in admin show
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/63326

Problem Summary:

If the embedded analyze failed, there is nothing shown in `ADMIN SHOW`.

### What changed and how does it work?

Show the failed analyze-status in `ADMIN SHOW`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The test simulated an ANALYZE timeout via long sleeps and timing-based polling, which is slow and sensitive to CI load, making it unstable.
failure_signature: Timing-based analyze-timeout test (sleep + polling interval) is unstable.
root_cause_explanation: The test previously simulated an ANALYZE timeout by sleeping for a long duration and relying on a fixed 10s polling interval, which makes it slow and prone to timing variance. This PR makes the timeout path deterministic and fast by making the check interval configurable, shortening the sleep, and injecting a failpoint (`mockAnalyzeTimeout`) to force the cumulative-timeout behavior.
fix_pattern: Make the analyze-timeout test deterministic: use a small check interval, short sleep, and failpoint `mockAnalyzeTimeout` instead of long time.Sleep-based timing.

evidence: files: pkg/ddl/ddl.go, pkg/ddl/index.go, pkg/ddl/job_worker.go, pkg/ddl/modify_column.go, pkg/executor/show_ddl_jobs.go, pkg/meta/model/reorg.go, tests/realtikvtest/addindextest4/integration_test.go
